notableEvents.label: José Tena pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: José Tena grounds out, shortstop Ha-Seong Kim to first baseman Matt Olson.

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Chadwick Tromp singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Dylan Crews. Eli White scores.
